component.name: LinuxSCP
component.summary: Commander-style SFTP file transfer for GNOME

description.p: LinuxSCP is a free and open source SFTP client for GNOME, built for people moving from Windows and WinSCP to Linux. It has a dual-pane, keyboard-driven commander layout and works directly with your existing ~/.ssh/config, so the hosts, jump proxies, keys and agents you already use just work.

ul.li: Dual-pane local/remote file management with familiar function keys
Tabbed sessions: several connections open side by side
Reads ~/.ssh/config: aliases, ProxyJump, ControlMaster, agents and hardware keys via the system OpenSSH
Site manager with nested folders, search, drag and drop, and an in-app ~/.ssh/config editor
Root file management through sudo or su elevation
Transfer queue with live progress, speed and ETA; copying starts while large trees are still being scanned
Right-click context menu with copy, cut and paste, and a properties dialog for permissions, owner and group
